# Automated Fact-Checker

[Originality.ai’s](https://originality.ai/) patented, real-time, and accurate Fact Checker identifies false facts and helps you avoid AI hallucinations. Publish content with integrity.

This site is protected by reCAPTCHA and the Google [Privacy Policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy) and [Terms of Service](https://policies.google.com/terms) apply.

Trusted by Industry Leaders

In addition to our Fact Checker feature listed on this page we have a complete suite of AI tools to help Editors including[AI Checking](https://originality.ai/), [Plagiarism Checking](https://originality.ai/plagiarism-checker), [Readability Checking](https://originality.ai/readability-checker)&[Grammar](https://originality.ai/grammar-checker)&[Spelling Checking](https://originality.ai/readability-checker).

Advanced, Comprehensive, and Precise

## Fact Checking Has Never Been More Important

![Image 70](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68262514616fe8e42e69f108_heading%20bottom%20line.svg)

Fact-checking is time-intensive, yet essential. Misinformation, potential false facts, and AI errors can have huge consequences; just consider the [Deloitte scandal](https://originality.ai/blog/deloitte-ai-report-errors-scandal)and the [AI book list scandal](https://originality.ai/blog/ai-book-list-scandal). Proper fact-checking means protecting the authenticity of your work as a writer, editor, student, or teacher.

![Image 71](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c50448e35f97c74725bb6_all%20apps%20icon.svg)
Benefits of Originality.ai’s Fact Checking Assistant

## Publish your content and submit assignments with confidence

![Image 72](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681b10b064a06e570bc725b1_h2-bottom-line.svg)

[Originality.ai's](https://originality.ai/) Fact Checker is built to support writers, students, editors, and teachers.

[Sign up now›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 73: Large AI Models](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/69d73340383f09861ab456a4_credible.svg)

Prevent the consequences of incorrect facts

*   Loss of credibility
*   Editorial delays
*   Spread of misinformation
*   AI model bias proliferation
*   Increased public scrutiny

![Image 74: Large AI Models](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/69d7334028b460d02bd2a8a3_verified.svg)

Real-time, accurate fact checks to streamline review

*   Fact Status: Potentially True or Potentially False
*   Explanation: Why is it Potentially True or False?
*   Source: Links to real-time sources
*   Real-time (not limited to Sept. 2021 or earlier)
*   Cross-reference and verify facts

![Image 75: Large AI Models](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/69d73340200691c2192cb474_newspaper.svg)

Generate bibliographic citations (1 citation or a full list)

*   Generate 1 citation or export a full citation list
*   Select citation style: APA, MLA, Chicago, IEEE
*   Export & download a PDF bibliography
*   Learn more about the [citations feature.](https://originality.ai/blog/feature-fact-checking-citations)

## Studies on "Do AI Detectors work?"

3rd Party AI Detection Accuracy Studies

Originality.ai was shown to be the most accurate AI detector across multiple published studies. Including the most in depth analysis to date looking at 12 detectors and 11 LLMs.

[Read more ›](https://originality.ai/blog/ai-detection-studies-round-up)

![Image 76: 3rd Party AI Detection Accuracy Studies](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c4d0d669d45a819d05b92_AI%20detector%20studies%20image.avif)

![Image 77: 3rd Party AI Detection Accuracy Studies](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682d816584d85a43a294beaa_Study%20table%20image.avif)

Internal AI Detection Benchmark & Study

Our detector was the most accurate across multiple publicly available datasets tested covering blog posts, books, research papers, essays, news, wiki and reviews. We built and open-sourced a testing tool to help others replicate on their own data.

[Read more ›](https://originality.ai/blog/ai-accuracy)

![Image 78: Internal AI Detection Benchmark & Study](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c4d12f5fea785fc20c72c_Accuracy%20study%20image.avif)

![Image 79: Internal AI Detection Benchmark & Study](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682d81652aba4dc219d9c812_Study%20table%202%20image.avif)

![Image 80](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c50448e35f97c74725bb6_all%20apps%20icon.svg)
Our unfair advantage

## Why are we most accurate?

![Image 81](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c4e13932e1c2d0bd1ad2d_heading%20bottom%20line.svg)
AI Detectors without an in-depth analysis verified by third party studies should be used with caution.

[Sign up now›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 82: Large AI Models](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682240043180e750d76b3aa1_network%20icon.svg)

Proven Third-Party Accuracy

You don’t just need to take our word for it. Independent [third-party studies](https://originality.ai/blog/ai-detection-studies-round-up) have also found the Originality.ai AI detector to be exceptionally accurate.

![Image 83: Focused on Published Text, Not Academia, Research, or Historical](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682240046c9d3097059f217d_focus%20icon.svg)

Accurate on Latest Models

We are constantly testing our AI detection models against the latest flagship models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta and other leading LLM providers.

![Image 84: Built and Trained on “Adversarial” Datasets](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682240042a88fa509e59378d_training%20icon.svg)

Built and Trained on “Adversarial” Datasets

We have a full time “Red Team” that is actively testing strategies to make undetectable AI content. Once they find a strategy (such as Paraphrase Plagiarism) that can create high quality[undetectable AI](https://originality.ai/blog/make-ai-writing-undetectable)generated text and bypass our AI content detector we improve our AI technology and make it detectable.

![Image 85](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c50448e35f97c74725bb6_all%20apps%20icon.svg)
Fact Checker Features

## How Does Originality.ai’s Automated Fact Checker Work?

![Image 86](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/6913e8f37b5013da66e87993_heading%20bottom%20line.svg)

[Originality.ai](https://originality.ai/) is the industry leader in [patented content quality tools.](https://originality.ai/blog/originality-ai-patent) The [Originality.ai](https://originality.ai/) Fact Checker is an internally built AI trained to provide factual answers, with context, sources, and citations. Not to mention it’s [highly accurate](https://originality.ai/blog/originality-ai-patent) with a superior edge over GPT-4o.

[Sign up now›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 87: Edit](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68262420e0b3a7f420199dfb_Edit%20image.avif)

1. Input Content

Input your content, such as a blog, essay, paper, or other assignment. Conveniently copy-paste, upload a document, import from a URL, or use the API.

![Image 88: Highlighting](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/69d9d87980fd90fb16375694_950bbd61b31b0f95a526c03b74e7aefe_Scan%20Entire%20Article.png)

2. Scan an Entire Article

Click to scan your entire document for factual accuracy. Then, review the Fact Check Score and the Potentially True or Potentially False facts.

![Image 89: Highlighting](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/6826242043b395cee2bcf07a_Highlighting%20image.avif)

3. Review Sources & Get Citations

Check the overall percentage of Potentially True or Potentially False facts and sources for each fact, then export the source as a citation (or the whole list of sources as a PDF bibliography).

![Image 90: A Complete QA/QC Solution](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c58c8572e607a991de03d_QA%20solution%20image.avif)

4. Organizational Fact Check Monitoring

Mitigate the risk of publishing factually incorrect information across all of your organization’s content with [Bulk Scan](https://originality.ai/bulk-scan) for checking facts, potential AI content, and plagiarism.

## Originality.ai is Built For…

![Image 91: Marketers, Writers & Publishers ](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/6820181e61501902f7884905_Web%20publisher.avif)

Marketers, Writers & Publishers

*   Transparently check for AI text to avoid[Google penalties](https://originality.ai/can-google-detect-penalize-ai-content)
*   Maintain brand integrity
*   [Bulk scan](https://originality.ai/bulk-scan) to understand AI usage site-wide
*   Stay ahead with [Predictive SEO](https://originality.ai/blog/predictive-seo-content-optimization-accuracy)
*   Check [factual accuracy](https://originality.ai/automated-fact-checker) (avoid AI hallucinations)
*   [Detect plagiarism](https://originality.ai/plagiarism-checker) and duplicate content
*   Streamline workflow with a [WordPress Plugin](https://originality.ai/wordpress-plugin)
*   Create engaging people-first, human-written content that’s rank-worthy and [readable](https://originality.ai/readability-checker)

[Scan your entire site with Originality.ai›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 92: Teachers & Students](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68d4e88032412b489d3eb78e_Teachers%20%26%20Students.avif)

Teachers & Students

*   Uphold integrity and transparency across: assignments, essays, coursework, papers
*   [Moodle Plugin](https://moodle.org/plugins/plagiarism_origai): easily check for AI content and plagiarism in Moodle LMS
*   Peace of mind for students with a [Free Chrome Extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/ai-detector-and-human-wri/kdngfaamkbbkdbemejnlkmjfpmndjdmb) to ‘Watch a Writer Write’
*   Deep Scan: See why text is flagged as AI + how to ethically edit it, so your work is identified as original (not AI)!

Integrations: Extensions & Plugins

## Works anywhere

Seamlessly integrate our AI Checker into your favorite platforms like Chrome, WordPress, Moodle and more. Check for AI use without skipping a beat.

[![Image 95](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681be1ea2906cbb26215c2d9_Chrome%20icon.svg) Chrome extensions](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/ai-detector-and-human-wri/kdngfaamkbbkdbemejnlkmjfpmndjdmb?pli=1)[![Image 96](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c63f47188a4ce6133bc24_Wordpress%20icon.svg) Wordpress plugin](https://originality.ai/wordpress-plugin)[![Image 97](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682019f03dc65fa89a37ed43_api%20icon.svg) API](https://docs.originality.ai/api-v2-0-new)[![Image 98](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68d06548395a837cd50e2d6c_Moodle%20icon.webp) Moodle](https://moodle.org/plugins/plagiarism_origai)

![Image 99: Works anywhere](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68da0d77f15a31572805275e_Creative%20Integration.avif)

## How to use Originality.ai

![Image 100: Paste or Upload Text](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c63ed0a87fb46d8428a9a_Paste%20text%20image.avif)

Step 1

Paste or Upload Text

Login to Originality.ai and paste your text into the editor. You may also upload a PDF or enter a URL for scanning.

![Image 101: Select Scan Types](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681b25c5bc2a73f9e1272c07_Scan%20type%20image.avif)

Step 2

Select Scan Types

Select your desired scan types like AI, Plagiarism, Content Optimization, Readability, Grammar OR Fact checker to scan your text against.

![Image 102: Click Scan](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c63edc493cae99425e470_Click%20scan%20image.avif)

Step 3

Click Scan

Click on the Scan button and get scores for each scan types with detailed explanations and sentence highlights wherever applicable.

## Benefits of Our Free AI Detector Chrome Extension

![Image 103: Check for AI Content on Any Website Quickly](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c544d194f3bfa17f39345_Quick%20scan%20image.avif)

Quick scan

Check for AI Content on Any Website Quickly

With our Chrome Extension you can check any webpage to see if it is AI written text.

![Image 104: Quickly Check Content Using our Copy/Paste Window](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c544d8a47d3c3b598b0f1_Easy%20copy%20paste%20image.avif)

Easy copy paste

Quickly Check Content Using our Copy/Paste Window

Easy-to-use copy and paste text window: check content within any text editor or CMS (like Wordpress).

![Image 105: Watch a Writer Write and Monitor for AI-generated copy](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/6826116086222c1442712793_Chrome%20extension%20benefits.avif)

Identify Copy Paste

Watch a Writer Write

Peace of mind for writers and students. Watch a writer write the entire document with a sped up behind the scenes look and shareable report.

Document History

Check Writing Activity by Author

See a history of writing sessions (table & graph), durations, authors, and number of characters to verify if content is Original.

![Image 106: See A Table & Graph Of Activity By the Author](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681be762b8f92b192dfb777b_Team%20management%20image.avif)

![Image 107: See A Table & Graph Of Activity By the Author](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/682d860ff4c40d48bdde6301_Document%20History%20image.avif)

## Security, Privacy, Controls & API

![Image 110](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c5572d6cc2020aa66b5da_heading%20bottom%20line.svg)
We understand the unique needs of high-volume web publishers, agencies, schools, and education institutions who need transparency at scale. Don’t risk the negative impacts of [Google search traffic dropping](https://originality.ai/can-google-detect-penalize-ai-content) or AI writing in student assignments.

[Sign up now›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 111: Team Management](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c1d3ccfce39c196ace366_Team%20management%20card%20image.avif)

Team Management

Add, remove and monitor usage of your organization's users. Assign roles as Admin, Manager or User to limit individual ability to access the whole set of features.

![Image 112: AI Checker API](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c1d3c8c4025a7157a341f_AI%20checker%20card%20image.avif)

AI Checker API

Reliable, Full-Featured, and Fast API Access. See the [AI detection API](https://docs.originality.ai/api-v2-0-new) your developers will love.

![Image 113: Your Text is Encrypted](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c1d3ca690d69858946199_End%20to%20end%20image.avif)

Your Text is Encrypted

TLS 1.2 or higher is achieved with our end-to-end military grade 256 bit encryption. Your content is highly protected, even our back-end engineers can’t access it.

![Image 114: Data Not Used in Training](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c1d3cd85257e145efa78a_Data%20opt%20out%20image.avif)

Data Not Used in Training

Optionally opt-in or opt-out of your data being used in future AI training.

![Image 115: A Complete QA/QC Solution](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c58c8572e607a991de03d_QA%20solution%20image.avif)

A Complete QA/QC Solution

Get a full suite of QA/QC features from plagiarism checking to fact checking and readability. Publish with integrity.

![Image 116: One-Click delete Scan History](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c58c8647e9c374df59c2a_Delete%20scan%20history%20image.avif)

1-Click Delete Scan History

Easily delete all your scan history in 1 click. Keep your scan and Originality reports history organized.

![Image 117: Sentence Level Highlighting](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c58c855af4eedd4bfe2d6_Sentence%20Highlighting%20image.avif)

Sentence Level Highlighting

Our AI content detector will highlight sentences indicating the probability of whether or not each sentence was AI written or human written.

What Is the Best AI Detector Model for Your Needs?

## Patented Industry Leading Models That Fit Your Use Case

![Image 119](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681b10b064a06e570bc725b1_h2-bottom-line.svg)

The use of AI in content writing is nuanced. We have models that are tuned to your specific use case. Whether you allow AI editing or want NO AI to get past your review we have a model that is optimized for your approach to AI text detection.

![Image 120: Lite 1.0.1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681b16be97c02e8d1a9a41f4_eba2ba6a5b29104700c04beabb3a2ace_Lite%201%20image.avif)

For Writers & Editors

Lite 1.0.2

When you allow AI editing (think grammarly)

*   99% accurate at detecting AI content.
*   0.5% false positive rate.
*   Allows for some light AI editing.

*   Robust against humanizing methods.

![Image 121: Lite 1.0.1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681b16be97c02e8d1a9a41f4_eba2ba6a5b29104700c04beabb3a2ace_Lite%201%20image.avif)

For Students & Teachers

Academic

Best for education use cases

*   99%+ accurate at detecting AI content.
*   <1% false positive rate.
*   Detect AI in academic writing.
*   Robust against humanizers.

![Image 122: Multi Language](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c5c5f6341af04beb49b38_Lite%20image.avif)

For Professionals

Turbo

Zero tolerance policy on use of AI

*   99%+ accurate at detecting AI content.
*   1.5% false positive rate.
*   Robust against bypassing methods.
*   Does not allow for AI editing.

![Image 123: Multi Language](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681c5c5f6341af04beb49b38_Lite%20image.avif)

For Non-English Texts

Multi Language

Optimized for 30 Languages

*   Including Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Dutch, Arabic and many other languages.
*   Removes language barriers globally.
*   Automatically detects the language.

## Key Originality.ai Features

![Image 128: Factual Accuracy](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68d4e87fcb60cddac9e38814_Factual%20Accuracy.avif)

Factual Accuracy

*   Real-time fact checking; check the latest facts (no training date cutoffs)
*   Avoid AI hallucinations like the [AI book scandal](https://originality.ai/blog/ai-book-list-scandal)
*   Save time with context and source links to verify facts fast

*   More Accurate than GPT-5: Our fact checker outperformed existing LLMs in our latest testing

[Is your content factually correct?›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 129: Plagiarism Checking](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68d4e87fb4f63d41371e72eb_Plagiarism%20Checking.avif)

Plagiarism Checking

*   Identify global plagiarism with 99.5% accuracy
*   Surpasses competitors like Copyscape, Grammarly and Turnitin
*   Modern plagiarism detection

*   Catch copy-paste and complex plagiarism types like paraphrase and patchwork

*   Shareable report to prove that writing is original and authentic

[Identify plagiarism in your text›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 130: Readability and Grammar Checking](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68d4e87f6d700f0af62ec113_Readability%20and%20Grammar%20Checking.avif)

Readability & Grammar Checking

*   The popular “aim for Grade 8 readability” target is _wrong_. Our readability scores are based on a [modern study](https://originality.ai/blog/best-readability-score-to-rank-in-google) of what _actually_ ranks well in Google!
*   Easily spot grammar and spelling issues and then refine copy in 1 click with ‘Fix issues’
*   Scale grammar and spelling checks with an API

[Write readable, grammatically correct text for your audience›](https://app.originality.ai/signup)

![Image 180](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 181](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 182](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 183](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 184](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)

**Originality.ai is the best tool on the market**. I have used comparable services and this one is exceptional. It provides an **accurate report with a match score**which really helps writers/researchers adjust and improve their work.

There are also **advanced features such as paraphrase detection** which are not available with any other comparable service. The features provided by Originality.ai are **exceptional for users who want to avoid plagiarism and also improve their research process**. I hope to continue using Originality.ai for many years to come.

![Image 185: Peter Stuart](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68e4b51690c96090c0dddfc6_Star.avif)

John Willsdon

![Image 186](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 187](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 188](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 189](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)![Image 190](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/68267104c0065d5441117397_Star%20image.svg)

This is a really helpful tool. Certainly **the best of the AI detectors** I tried. What makes it great is that you also get a bunch of other tools that are really helpful. The **fact checker is awesome**, it gives you feedback on whether or not points in your essay are factual or not by reading the source material in your citations.

Originality.ai saved me from making a big mistake. I have written a book with the help of ChatGPT, 40% of my work is AI; 60% is human. **It identified the AI, and now I am writing it all by myself. 88-100% human. Thank you Originality.ai**.

It worked so well that I actually tested it out with some material I created using AI as an example and sure enough,**it perfectly determined which was my work, what was totally AI-written, and what was edited AI material**.

Jennifer Korn

How companies are embracing generative AI for employees…or not

Many prominent companies have entirely blocked internal ChatGPT use, including [JPMorgan Chase](https://www.cnn.com/2023/02/22/tech/jpmorgan-chatgpt-employees/index.html), Northrup Grumman, Apple, Verizon, Spotify and Accenture, according to AI content detector Originality.AI, with several citing privacy and security concerns.

[Read the story ›](https://edition.cnn.com/2023/09/22/tech/generative-ai-corporate-policy/index.html)

![Image 286: Politico](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/6826c23bab8ee1fb86f9a009_Politico%20icon.svg)
Ben Schreckinger

AI vs. public opinion

Originality.ai, a site that provides detection services for AI-generated content and plagiarism, published a [convenient tracker](https://originality.ai/blog/openai-chatgpt-lawsuit-list) that lists the 10 pending lawsuits against OpenAI and ChatGPT.

[Read the story ›](https://www.politico.com/newsletters/digital-future-daily/2023/09/25/ai-vs-public-opinion-00118002)

![Image 287: The Guardian](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/6826c76b9e6c4e5f97c0aa7b_The%20Guardion.svg)
Betsy Reed

Mushroom pickers urged to avoid foraging books on Amazon that appear to be written by AI

Four samples from the books were examined for the Guardian by Originality.ai, a US firm that detects AI content.

[Read the story ›](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2023/sep/01/mushroom-pickers-urged-to-avoid-foraging-books-on-amazon-that-appear-to-be-written-by-ai)

![Image 288: The New York times](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/6826c7e02a64b0f5e7a8a53f_thenyt.svg)
Steven Lee Myers & Tiffany Hsu

Another Side of the A.I. Boom: Detecting What A.I. Makes

More than a dozen companies have popped up to offer services aimed at identifying whether photos, text and videos are made by humans or machines.

[Read the story ›](https://www.nytimes.com/2023/05/18/technology/ai-chat-gpt-detection-tools.html)

![Image 289: Financial Times](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/6826c825dc5b8a3ac2f45f3b_Financial%20Times.svg)
Generative AI: hype not hyperintelligence is lifting values

Generative artificial intelligence could produce [magic in the sky](https://www.ft.com/content/dd9ba2f6-f509-42f0-8e97-4271c7b84ded), says Sam Altman founder of pioneering start-up OpenAI. Successful entrepreneurs are entitled to make visionary statements.

[Read the story ›](https://www.ft.com/content/26d9f37b-bf22-4662-9fc8-1a1ae50011f3#comments-anchor)

![Image 290: Axios](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/68277978871118ea6b09e6bb_Axios%20logo.svg)
Sara Fischer

Major websites are blocking AI crawlers from accessing their content

Nearly 20% of the top 1000 websites in the world are blocking crawler bots that gather web data for AI services, according to new data from [Originality.AI](https://originality.ai/ai-bot-blocking), an AI content detector.

[Read the story ›](https://www.axios.com/2023/08/31/major-websites-are-blocking-ai-crawlers-from-accessing-their-content)

![Image 291: Nature](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/6827796429a360fa31f283b9_nature%20logo.svg)
Andrea Taloni, Vincenzo Scorcia, and Giuseppe Giannaccare

Modern threats in academia: evaluating plagiarism and artificial intelligence detection scores of ChatGPT

Plagiarism and research integrity are sensitive issues in the academic setting, especially after the recent offspring of artificial intelligence (AI) and large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-4.0 [[1]](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41433-023-02678-7#ref-CR1).

[Read the story ›](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41433-023-02678-7)

![Image 292: Digiday](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f640fa6b177c9/68277949026b6a0660e193ba_Digiday%20logo.svg)
Sara Guaglione

Why publishers are questioning the effectiveness of blocking AI web crawlers

A number of publishers — including Bloomberg and The New York Times — were quick to block OpenAI’s web crawler [from accessing their sites](https://digiday.com/media/wtf-is-openais-gptbot/), to protect their content from getting scraped and used to feed the artificial intelligence tech company’s large language models (LLMs).

[Read the story ›](https://digiday.com/media/a-symbolic-gesture-publishers-question-the-effectiveness-of-blocking-ai-web-crawlers/)

[View All Press›](https://originality.ai/press)

## Frequently Asked Questions

![Image 293](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681b2058f1a08c26aae9a581_h2-bottom-line3.svg)

How accurate is the Fact-checker?

![Image 294](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

We completed a [fact checker accuracy study](https://originality.ai/blog/ai-fact-checking-accuracy) looking at the accuracy of our Fact Checking aid. The results show an overall 86.69% accuracy. Originality.ai closely tied GPT-5 for accuracy, with a slight lead (Originality = 86.69% accuracy vs. GPT-5 = 86.67%), while decisively beating GPT-4o. However, the accuracy still means that the tool should be used as a fact checking aid and not viewed as the final source of truth.

What kinds of facts can I check?

![Image 295](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

Nearly everything! The fact has to be verifiable though, so for example you can’t check “Chocolate ice cream is the best flavour.” as this is an opinion which cannot be peer verified. Also, for now we are steering clear of anything political.

Is it multilingual?

![Image 296](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

In short, no. But watch this space for updates in the coming months!

What is the source coverage for the Fact Checker and does it provide source citations?

![Image 297](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

The Originality.ai Fact Checker has at least 1 source for every identified fact, each with a url, and now a title and date (if relevant). Plus, you can now generate a quick copy-pasteable citation in the style of your choice (APA, MLA, Chicago Notes and Bibliography, IEEE) for each individual search result source used by the Fact Scanner in its evaluation. Additionally, users can now generate a .docx or .txt file containing all the sources the Fact Scanner used in its scan.

How does the Fact Checker work?

![Image 298](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

In short the checker goes through the content per sentence, fetches relevant URLs, and uses their content and your article to verify your fact.

Can I check recent information?

![Image 299](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

Yes. Our fact-checker is internet-connected, allowing us to deliver results based on the latest information.

What sources does the fact-checker use to verify information?

![Image 300](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

The [Originality.ai](https://originality.ai/) Fact Checker has at least 1 source for every identified fact, each with a url, and now a title and date (if relevant). Plus, you can now generate a quick copy-pasteable citation in the style of your choice (APA, MLA, Chicago Notes and Bibliography, IEEE) for each individual search result source used by the Fact Scanner in its evaluation. Additionally, users can now generate a PDF bibliography of citations with all of the sources from the fact checking scan.

Does the fact-checker store or share the information I input?

![Image 301](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

We value user privacy and ensure data is handled with utmost security. All information concerning our privacy policy can be found here -[https://originality.ai/privacy-policy](https://originality.ai/privacy-policy)

How is the accuracy of the fact-checker measured?

![Image 302](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

We conducted an updated 2025 study on our fact checker’s accuracy. To find out how we measure fact checker accuracy, what datasets we used to evaluate the tool, and how Originality.ai compares to GPT-4o and GPT-5[read the full study](https://originality.ai/privacy-policy).

Are there any costs associated with using the fact-checker?

![Image 303](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

We offer various pricing options to suit different needs. All information concerning our pricing can be found here[https://originality.ai](https://originality.ai/)

Can I submit feedback or corrections to the fact-checker?

![Image 304](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63ee996e404f6475c7b177b3/681d6e5783e01416ba0b5734_faq-icon.svg)

Yes absolutely! We always love to hear ways in which we can improve,[contact our exceptional support team](https://originality.ai/contact-us)to provide feedback.
